steps.action: Open / at 1440x1200 and inspect token header + chart section
steps.expected: Price and percentage are shown inside/above chart area, not in token header
steps.observed: Token header text was identity-only ("CASH $CASH"). Price/change row appeared in chart section above chart controls.

steps.action: Check element positions via browser eval
steps.expected: Price row is part of chart section structure
steps.observed: Price row y=180..216 and chart shell y=276..632 (same chart section flow, 60px spacing above chart).

evidence.consoleErrors: Console contained repeated 429 resource-load errors from localhost:3100 endpoints.
evidence.network: GET /candles?interval=5m -> 429, GET /market -> 429, GET /depth -> 429, GET /trades?limit=10|50 -> 429 (via performance entries).

steps.action: Measure chart shell in rendered UI

evidence.consoleErrors: Repeated 429 errors in console while chart data endpoints were requested.

steps.expected: Header shows only token logo/name/symbol (no price or percentage)
steps.observed: Header displayed token identity only: logo, "CASH", "$CASH"; price/change appeared in separate chart price row.

evidence.consoleErrors: Repeated 429 resource errors present in console.
evidence.network: Background market/candles requests were rate-limited (429), but header composition remained verifiable.

steps.action: Check top-of-content breadcrumb above token header
steps.observed: Breadcrumb text rendered as "Tokens > CASH" above the token header.

evidence.consoleErrors: Repeated 429 errors in console from API fetches.

assertions.title: Chart has no card border

steps.action: Inspect chart wrapper and rendered chart region styles
steps.expected: No card border/background/padding wrapper around rendered chart
steps.observed: Outer chart shell had border=0 and transparent background, but chart data failed and error-state placeholder rendered with dashed border and background.

steps.expected: Recover chart data and validate true rendered chart container state
steps.observed: All retries still produced 429 on chart/market endpoints; UI remained in error placeholder state.

evidence.consoleErrors: High-volume `Failed to load resource: 429 (Too Many Requests)` errors.
evidence.network: GET /candles?interval=5m -> 429 and related market/depth/trades requests -> 429; chart stayed in fallback.

assertions.issues: Blocked by API rate limiting (429), preventing validation of normal rendered chart state; only fallback box with dashed border was available.

steps.action: Inspect 1H/1D/1W/1M/1Y/ALL controls visually and via computed styles
steps.expected: Text-style controls, no pill backgrounds; active state subtle highlight
steps.observed: Buttons had transparent backgrounds and 0px border radius; active 1D used text color/weight emphasis (no pill).

evidence.network: Range controls visible despite /candles and related endpoints returning 429.

assertions.title: Proportional font for prices

steps.action: Check computed fonts for price, stat values, and amount fields
steps.expected: All use proportional sans-serif (no monospace for price/stat/amount values)
steps.observed: Price/stat values used GeistSans, but amount input (`textbox "0"`) used `GeistMono` (24px), which is monospace.

steps.action: Capture element style for amount input
steps.expected: Amount input should match proportional font requirement

evidence.consoleErrors: Repeated 429 errors from API requests during page runtime.
evidence.network: N/A for typography check; background polling still showed 429 responses.

assertions.issues: Typography requirement not fully met: amount field remains monospace.

frictions.description: Local API endpoints (`/candles`, `/market`, `/depth`, `/trades`) repeatedly returned HTTP 429, causing chart fallback state and noisy console errors.
frictions.resolution: Performed non-disruptive retries (reload + networkidle) and continued with assertions that remained visually verifiable.

blockers.description: Unable to validate normal borderless rendered chart state because chart data requests remained rate-limited (429) and only error fallback UI was displayed.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Reloaded page 3 times with network-idle waits; 429 responses persisted.

summary: Tested 7 assertions: 5 passed, 1 failed (VAL-TYPE-001), 1 blocked (VAL-CHART-005 due API 429 fallback-only chart state).
